note_text:
Subjective: Patient reports pain at Right lower extremity wound site, rates 5/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Arterial arterial Right lower extremity measures 2.6 cm x 1.3 cm x 0.5 cm.
  Wound bed: 40% slough, 60% granulation tissue. Periwound: erythematous.
  Drainage: moderate. Odor: none.
Assessment: Arterial arterial Right lower extremity — improving.
Plan: Alginate dressing applied. Negative pressure wound therapy initiated.
